title: Weliketa Crusted Sakestello
description: A unique dish featuring weliketa crust on a tender sakestello, a perfect blend of flavors and textures.
instructions: Season the sakestello with salt and pepper.
Dip the sakestello in the weliketa powder, coating it evenly.
Brush the sakestello with lemon juice and olive oil.
Place the sakestello on a baking sheet and bake for 20-25 minutes.
Check the sakestello for tenderness and adjust cooking time if necessary.
Remove the sakestello from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Slice the sakestello and serve immediately.
